name: app-it-windows
description: Turn local web projects into Windows Start Menu launchable .exe apps. Beta · scaffolded · untested on real hardware · maintainer wanted.

interface.shortDescription: Make local web projects launchable from the Windows Start Menu (beta, maintainer wanted).
interface.longDescription: App It (Windows beta) turns a local web project into a repeatable Windows launcher with a native WPF + WebView2 window, its own Taskbar identity, multi-resolution .ico, and a Start Menu shortcut. Scaffolded but not yet dogfooded on real Windows hardware — the author runs macOS only. See docs/WINDOWS.md; a Windows maintainer is wanted.
defaultPrompt: Use app-it-windows to make this project launchable from the Windows Start Menu.
Give this local app a Windows .exe launcher with its own icon and Taskbar entry.
Scaffold a Windows desktop launcher for this project (beta).
